scripts.dev: pnpm exec portless api.axc.localhost --force tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:worktree: WORKTREE_NAME=${WORKTREE_NAME:-worktree} pnpm exec portless api.axc.${WORKTREE_NAME}.localhost --force tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test:arch: node -e "console.log('No arch tests defined in @apps/api; real architecture boundary tests live in @axc-verification/archunit-tests and are the only ones executed by verify. See plan and archunit rules for rest/domain/persistence layering.')"
